prediction.reasoning: As an AI, I cannot predict future stock prices, which are influenced by countless real-time factors and inherent market unpredictability. The current price of MS ($166.80) is provided by the user and serves as the basis for these calculations. As I lack real-time market data and predictive capabilities, the point estimate for the price in 3 days is set to this provided current price ($166.80) as a neutral baseline, assuming no directional bias. The confidence intervals are illustrative and calculated based on a simplified theoretical model (random walk with drift zero) using an assumed annualized volatility of 25% for a large-cap stock. The standard deviation for 3 trading days was estimated as approximately 2.73% of the current price ($4.55), and then scaled by the appropriate Z-scores for each confidence level (0.674 for 50%, 1.282 for 80%, 1.645 for 90%). These calculations do not account for real-time market sentiment, news, economic reports, or any other specific catalyst that could affect MS stock, nor do they reflect current market prices beyond the value provided in the prompt.
